16.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
16.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

16.gl: drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement
16.kj: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.

17.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

17.gl: a bisection, i.e. (by implication) the centre

17.gl: complete; as noun, the whole (specifically, a sacrifice entirely consumed); as adverb, fully
17.kj: all, every whit, flame, perfect(-ion), utterly, whole burnt offering (sacrifice), wholly.
